en: OK, Electric is not over yet.
Can we go and see it?
To scare manoon that he is literally just dead to begin with.
ko: 마눈을 겁주기 위해 그는 원래부터 죽어있어.

en: Expected to explode after this first fangame. Sounds better. continues to accelerate
ko: 이 첫 번째 팬게임 이후 폭발할 것으로 예상돼. 더 나아 보인다. 계속 가속 중.

en: It's starting to feel that heavy torque.
The car sound boss is back.
You're lucky you came at a right time.
Might as well chip away at you.
This thing is much louder than the normal mode.
Moves to a higher pitch taking notes.
The car sound boss is back.
You're lucky you came at a right time.
Might as well chip away at you.
